apache-pulsar/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 11 to Java 21 to enforce compilation for the new JDK version.
apache-pulsar/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 11 APIs and bytecode, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if Java 21-specific code is introduced elsewhere.
